description: You are a software developer at a digital archive. The media_organizer tool (located at ~/PycharmProjects/media_organizer) is used to sort photos into folders based on date and GPS location. Fix the reported bugs in the codebase: incorrect GPS coordinate conversion for Western/Southern hemispheres, crashes during date parsing for formats like YYYY-MM-DD, and silent overwriting of files with duplicate names. Implement safe file moving that renames on conflict (e.g., file.jpg to file_1.jpg) and ensure all 12 tests in the tests/ directory pass.
